x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Manage zou-flow.

Environment variables:
  [33mNO_COLOR[0m
    1 → do not use colors
  [33mZOU_HSEP_CHAR[0m [default: [33m─[0m]
  [33mZOU_VSEP_CHAR[0m [default: [33m│[0m]
    horizontal and vertical separator characters
  [33mZOU_PREFIX_FORMAT[0m [default: [33m3[0m]
    0 → [97m[[39;2;96mmodule[22;38;5;23m--------[39;2;33mhead[22;97m][39m[0m
    1 → [97m[[39;2;96mmodule[22;38;5;23m ------ [39;2;33mhead[22;97m][39m[0m
    2 → [2;96mmodule[22;38;5;23m--------[39;2;33mhead[22;38;5;23m |[39m[0m
    3 → [2;96mmodule[22;38;5;23m ------ [39;2;33mhead[22;38;5;23m |[39m[0m
  [33mZOU_SKIP_INIT[0m
    true → skip initialisation
  [33mZOU_NO_WIP_REBASE[0m
    true → no WIP rebase

options.name: -Z
options.description: Do not display status at all (faster). [default: False]

options.name: -z
options.description: Display only modified or untracked content status. [default: False]
Force color even if redirected. [default: False]

options.name: -A
options.description: Visit all submodules (do not skip excluded ones). [default: False]

options.name: -C
options.description: Run as if zou was started in <startup-dir>.

commands.name: align
commands.description:
Checkout, in all modules, commits whose date is close to the current module head.
It is useful for reconstructing the approximate state of a multi-module repository
at a specific point in time, even when submodules were not perfectly aligned.

options.name: -d
options.description: Align descendants modules only. [default: bundle tree] [default: False]

options.name: -t
options.description: Time margin to align with in hours. [default: 1 hour]

arguments.name: commitish
arguments.description: The commitish to align with. [default: HEAD]

commands.name: attach
commands.description: Checkout the best SKU branch pointing at a detached head.

options.name: --vtag
options.description: Checkout most recent version tags. [default: False]

commands.name: browse
commands.description: Browse the current module in a web browser.

commands.name: checkout
commands.description: Checkout a commit or branch in the current module.

options.name: -f
options.description: Force checkout (throw away local modifications) [default: False]

arguments.name: committish
arguments.description: The commit or branch to checkout. [default: HEAD]

commands.name: clean
commands.description:
Clean up inactive branches (see zou sync -h), delete ignored files or clean dangling submodules.
When deleting ignored files, node, cargo and nuget artifacts are not deleted by default.
Use [33m--node, --cargo or --nuget[0m options to delete them as well.

options.name: -b
options.description:
Clean up inactive branches.
Do not delete ignored files. [default: False]

options.name: -i
options.description:
Delete ignored files excluding nested node, cargo and nuget artifacts.
Do not clean up inactive branches. [default: False]

options.name: --node
options.description: Delete ignored files including nested [33mnode_modules[0m directory. [default: False]

options.name: --cargo
options.description: Delete ignored files including nested cargo [33mtarget[0m directory. [default: False]

options.name: --nuget
options.description: Delete ignored files including nested nuget [33mpackages[0m directory. [default: False]

options.name: --usm
options.description:
Delete working directories of Untracked SubModules.
Do not clean branches nor delete ignored files. [default: False]

commands.name: clone
commands.description:
Clone or synchronize a git repository.
- if the working directory exists, synchronize (unless -u option is specified).
- if a SKU is specified, switch to it in specified mode (dev, prod or vtag).

options.name: --url
options.description:
The remote URL.
Optional if an existing working directory is specified.

options.name: --vtag
options.description: Checkout most recent version tags. [default: False]

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull if working directory exists. [default: False]

arguments.name: work-dir
arguments.description:
The working directory.
Optional if a remote URL is specified.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: Display color codes for specific topic. [default: Logging]

arguments.name: messages
arguments.description: Commit messages

arguments.name: sm-paths
arguments.description: Paths of the submodules to set as external.

arguments.name: sm-paths
arguments.description: Paths of the submodules to set as internal.

arguments.name: sm-paths
arguments.description: Paths of the submodules to exclude from SKU.

arguments.name: sm-paths
arguments.description: Paths of the submodules to include in SKU.

options.name: --none
options.description: Do not use default principal module [default: False]

arguments.name: pm-path
arguments.description: Path of the principal submodule.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Register, unregister or list version resources.

options.name: -n
options.description: Display operations but do not execute. [default: False]

options.name: --csproj
options.description: Filter C# project old style files. [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --me
options.description: Commit current module in parent module. [default: False]

options.name: -x
options.description: Update external submodules with new commits. [default: False]

arguments.name: submodule-paths
arguments.description: Submodules to commit.

commands.name: release
commands.description: Release development to production (pull all, merge DEV branch into PROD branch).

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

commands.name: fetch
commands.description: Fetch branches, tags and notes from all remotes.

options.name: -n
options.description: Display operations but do not execute. [default: False]

options.name: -f
options.description: Force update of local reference. [default: False]

options.name: -u
options.description: Force tags pruning with multiple remotes. [default: False]

options.name: --no-prune
options.description: Do not prune during fetch. [default: False]

arguments.name: host
arguments.description: The host of the forge. [default: module host]

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

commands.name: select
commands.description:
Select a bundle hotfix. This command is equivalent to the [33mprod select[0m
followed by the [33mhotfix enter[0m commands.
- if no version is specified, select the active hotfix.
- if no hotfix is found, select the last production version.
- if the command is invoked in a submodule, find the bundle version
  containing the submodule version and select it.

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

arguments.name: vspec
arguments.description: Version tag or hotfix branch specification.

commands.name: backport
commands.description: Pick new hotfix commits into development branch.

options.name: -n
options.description: Display operations but do not execute. [default: False]

arguments.name: vspec
arguments.description: Version tag or hotfix branch specification.

commands.name: clean
commands.description:
Clean hotfix branches:
- delete hotfix branches without new commits.
- fast-forward prod branches to associated hotfix branches.

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge a commit into a branch.

options.name: --sync
options.description: If the commit is a branch, merge both. [default: False]

arguments.name: commit
arguments.description: The commit to merge.

arguments.name: branch
arguments.description: The target branch.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
List merge requests.
Use the [33m-v[0m option to display associated commits.

options.name: -s
options.description: Use compact one line format. [default: False]

commands.name: nupkg
commands.description:
Generate nuget package versions scripts.
- update the [33mzou/Directory.Packages.Floating.props[0m script with minor or major versions
- then run the [33mzou nupkg[0m command to freeze the package versions.

options.name: -n
options.description: Do not commit versions changes. [default: False]

arguments.name: framework-major-version
arguments.description: Framework major version list. [default: 8, 9, 10]

commands.name: oclone
commands.description: Create a remote locally based on the current repo and redirect tracking to it.

arguments.name: remote-path
arguments.description: The local path for the new remote. [default: devel/zou.remotes]

commands.name: oreset
commands.description: Reset local branches to remote branches, prune tags and branches.

options.name: -t
options.description: The target branch to cherry-pick into. [default: HEAD]

options.name: -n
options.description: Display operations but do not execute. [default: False]

arguments.name: commits
arguments.description:
One or more commits to cherry-pick. Commit ranges ([33mREV1..REV2[0m) are supported.
Commits and commit ranges can be specified in any order.
They will be ordered topologically from less to most recent before cherry-picking.
Use the [33m-n|--dry-run[0m option to display operations without executing them.

options.name: --vtag
options.description: Checkout most recent version tags. [default: False]

commands.name: select
commands.description:
Select a published bundle snapshot.
- if no version is specified, use the last published version (vlast).
- if the command is invoked in a submodule, select the last snapshot
  containing the specified submodule version.

arguments.name: vspec
arguments.description: Version tag or prod branch specification.

commands.name: release
commands.description: Create a tagged snapshot (tag production/hotfix branches).

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Do not restore previous SKU mode after releasing. [default: False]

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Create a tagged snapshot (tag production/hotfix branches).

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Do not restore previous SKU mode after releasing. [default: False]

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

commands.name: repair
commands.description:
Repair repository.
- delete redondant vtags
- repair malformed vtag names
- remove oldver folder
- remove orphan folder
- delete orphan vnodes
- restore missing vbranches
- restore missing vnodes
- fix vbranch location

options.name: -n
options.description: Display operations but do not execute. [default: False]

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

arguments.name: bundle-folders
arguments.description: Bundle folders in the sandbox root directory.

commands.name: setup
commands.description:
Setup additional features:
- shell completions
- internal tools setup

options.name: -s
options.description: Enable Bash and PowerShell completions. [default: False]

options.name: -f
options.description: Overwrite existing shell completions shims. [default: False]

commands.name: shar
commands.description: Compute the composite SHA of a SKU.

commands.name: align
commands.description: Align the bundle tree with the given commitish of the current module.

arguments.name: commitish
arguments.description: The commitish to align with. [default: HEAD]

arguments.name: sku
arguments.description: The SKU name.

arguments.name: commitish
arguments.description: The commitish where to create the SKU.

options.name: --vtag
options.description: Checkout most recent version tags. [default: False]

arguments.name: sku
arguments.description: The SKU name. [default: active SKU]

commands.name: move
commands.description:
Move source SKU to target SKU:
- rename source vtags to target vtags
- merge source branches into target branches
- delete source branches

arguments.name: source-sku
arguments.description: The source SKU name.

arguments.name: target-sku
arguments.description: The target SKU name. [default: bundle SKU]

arguments.name: submodule-paths
arguments.description: Submodules to delete.

commands.name: sync
commands.description:
Synchronize branches, tags, and notes and clean up inactive branches.
An inactive branch is a local branch that:
- is not the current branch nor the default branch
- has an upstream branch with the same name
- has no new commits compared to its upstream branch

options.name: -p
options.description: Do not push local modifications. [default: False]

options.name: -b
options.description: Force auto-rebase instead of merge. [default: [33mpull.rebase[0m] [default: False]

options.name: -m
options.description: Force merge instead of auto-rebase. [default: False]

options.name: --no-prune
options.description: Do not prune during fetch. [default: False]

options.name: --no-clean-up
options.description: Do not clean up inactive branches. [default: False]

options.name: -x
options.description: Show only commits pointed by more than one tag. [default: False]

options.name: -t
options.description: Order tags by the commit time of the commit pointed by the tag. [default: False]

options.name: -x
options.description: Treat tag specifications as regular expressions. [default: False]

options.name: -k
options.description: Do not keep source tag message history. [default: False]

arguments.name: src
arguments.description: Source tag specification.

arguments.name: dst
arguments.description: Destination tag specification. [default: <src>]

options.name: -o
options.description: The file path to save the formatted output. [default: display to the console]

arguments.name: spec
arguments.description: A revparse spec for the vtable to lookup. [default: last vtag in current SKU]

arguments.name: wip-id
arguments.description:
The wip identifier.
Format: [[90m<prefix>:[0m][33m<name>[0m.
Example: [90mwip:[33mmy[0m, [33missue:328[0m.

commands.name: enter
commands.description: Checkout wip branches in specified modules recursively and in their ancestors.

arguments.name: wip-id
arguments.description:
The wip identifier.
Format: [[90m<prefix>:[0m][33m<name>[0m.
Example: [90mwip:[33mmy[0m, [33missue:328[0m.

commands.name: exit
commands.description: Exit wip mode in specified modules recursively.

commands.name: finish
commands.description: Release, exit and delete wip branches in specified modules recursively.

options.name: -e
options.description: Merge [33mwip-id[0m [and [33mtarget-wip-id[0m] into [33mdev branch[0m and release [33mdev branch[0m to [33mprod branch[0m. [default: False]

options.name: --major

options.name: --minor

options.name: -u
options.description: Do not pull before executing command. (faster but [33munsafe[0m) [default: False]

options.name: -m
options.description: Force merge instead of auto-rebase. [default: False]

options.name: -b
options.description: Force auto-rebase instead of merge. [default: [33mpull.rebase[0m] [default: False]

arguments.name: wip-id

The wip identifier.

arguments.name: wip-id

The wip identifier.

commands.name: ipub
commands.description:
Display info/commits for modules that have changed since last release (vlast).
- the [96mpub[0m column represents the number of new commits that will be included in the next release (vnext).
- the [96mwrk[0m column represents the number of new commits that are not ready for the next release.
- the [96mvlast[0m column represents the version of the last release.
- the [96mvnext[0m column represents the version of the next release.
If the [96m-v|--verbose[0m option is specified, the command logs associated commits.

options.name: -p
options.description: Show only submodules with pub > 0. [default: False]

options.name: -w
options.description: Show only submodules with wrk > 0. [default: False]

commands.name: isku
commands.description:
Display the list of available SKUs using the following color code:
- [33mactive SKU[0m
- [90minactive SKU[0m
- [95morphan SKU[0m (the prod branch has no associated dev branch)

options.name: -k
options.description: Display only modules that have a <sku> specialization.

commands.name: iwip
commands.description:
Display available wips.

WIP symbol:
    [33m▼[0m → the wip has descendant[s]
    [33m▲[0m → the wip has ancestor[s]
    [33m◆[0m → the wip has descendant[s] and ancestor[s]
    [33m◌[0m → the wip has no descendant nor ancestor
    [95m✘[0m → the wip can be deleted with option [33m-d|--purge[0m

Color codes:
    [92m▼[0m wip[90m:[92mfeature-1    [0m → (wip = dev)
    [38;5;28m◌[0m wip[90m:[38;5;28mfeature-2[97m[[38;5;100m-4[97m][0m → (wip < dev) of  4 commits
    [95m✘[0m wip[90m:[38;5;28mfeature-3[97m[[38;5;100m-8[97m][0m → (wip < dev) of  8 commits
    [33m▲[0m wip[90m:[33mfeature-4[97m[[38;5;220m12[97m][0m → (wip > dev) of 12 commits

    - [92mfeature-1[0m, [38;5;28mfeature-2[0m and [38;5;28mfeature-3[0m are released
    - [38;5;28mfeature-3[0m can be deleted with option [33m-d|--purge[0m
    - [33mfeature-4[0m is not released

options.name: -m
options.description: Group wips by module sections. [default: by wip sections]. [default: False]

options.name: -d
options.description: Delete wips that are already released. [default: False]

options.name: -n
options.description: Display operations but do not execute. [default: False]

options.name: -V
options.description: Display all commits. [default with [33m-v[0m: skip merge and zou commits]. [default: False]

options.name: -k
options.description: Display only modules that have a <sku> specialization.

options.name: -c
options.description: Display children with same wip. [default: False]

arguments.name: wip-id
arguments.description: The wip identifier to display. [default: all].
